name: llm-hostbun-router
description: Single-URL OpenAI-compatible LLM router behind llm.hostbun.cc

scripts.test: node test/imports.test.mjs && node translate.test.js && node test/wire.test.mjs && node test/router.test.mjs
scripts.build:panel: cd panel && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.dev: PORT=${PORT:-8787} CONFIG_FILE=${CONFIG_FILE:-./.local/config.json} DOCS_FILE=./docs/index.html PANEL_DIR=${PANEL_DIR:-$PWD/panel/out} PRICES_FILE=${PRICES_FILE:-./.local/prices.json} SESSION_INSECURE=1 node server.js
